name: ValidateAI
description: Real-time fact-checking via voice. Say 'even check' to verify the last statement heard.
author: vikarux

permissions.name: g2-microphone
permissions.desc: Captures audio from the G2 microphone array for real-time speech-to-text transcription

permissions.name: network
permissions.desc: Connects to Deepgram for speech recognition and Anthropic Claude API for fact-checking with web search
